title: My home routine
objective: Describir espacios de la casa, objetos de uso diario y acciones sencillas que ocurren en ellos.

activities.prompt: You wash your hands in the ___.
activities.feedback_correct: Sink es el lavabo o fregadero.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca el objeto donde normalmente lavas tus manos.

activities.prompt: I keep my clothes in the ___.
activities.feedback_correct: Wardrobe es el armario para la ropa.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige el mueble donde guardas prendas.

activities.feedback_correct: El orden es sujeto + verbo + posesivo + objeto.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Coloca make antes de my bed.

activities.instruction: Une la acción con el lugar u objeto.
activities.feedback_correct: Relacionas acciones cotidianas con espacios de la casa.

activities.prompt: I make the breakfast in bedroom.
activities.correct_answer: I make breakfast in the kitchen.
activities.feedback_correct: Breakfast se prepara normalmente en the kitchen.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Cambia la habitación y evita the antes de breakfast en este contexto.

activities.prompt: In the morning, I make my bed, take a shower, and have breakfast in the kitchen. Then I leave the house.
activities.question: Where does the speaker have breakfast?
activities.feedback_correct: El audio dice have breakfast in the kitchen.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la acción después de take a shower.

activities.instruction: Graba la rutina de la mañana.
activities.prompt: I make my bed. I take a shower. I have breakfast in the kitchen. I leave the house.
activities.feedback_correct: Tu rutina se entiende y las acciones están bien conectadas.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica las frases como grupos, no palabra por palabra.

activities.prompt: Luis lives in a small apartment. The kitchen is next to the living room. His desk is in the bedroom, beside the window. He studies there every evening.
activities.question: Where does Luis study?
options: At his desk in the bedroom.
activities.correct_answer: At his desk in the bedroom.
activities.feedback_correct: El texto relaciona el escritorio y la habitación.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la oración con studies there.

activities.prompt: Write eight sentences about what you do in different rooms at home. Include five objects and three location phrases.
activities.feedback_correct: Conectas habitaciones, objetos y acciones cotidianas.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa in the, on the o next to the para ubicar cada acción u objeto.

activities.instruction: Pide ayuda a tu compañero de casa.
activities.prompt: You are sharing a house with the AI. Explain your morning routine, ask where household items are, and solve one small problem together.
success_criteria: uses five room or object words
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes hablar de actividades domésticas y pedir información útil.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA usa un plano sencillo de la casa y practica las frases que necesites.
